seo.title: WinkLinks | Bookable Bio-Link Storefronts
seo.metaDescription: Turn any bio link, campaign or QR code into a mobile-first hotel storefront. Bookable cards, live rates, two taps from profile to confirmed booking.
seo.ogTitle: WinkLinks | Your Bio Link Should Book Rooms
seo.ogDescription: Turn a profile, campaign, QR code, or partner recommendation into a mobile-first hotel storefront.

fields.body: Turn any bio link, campaign or QR code into a mobile-first hotel storefront. Bookable cards, live rates, two taps from profile to confirmed booking.

cards.title: Show real hotel cards
cards.body: Present hotel content, images, rates, offers, and booking routes in one mobile-first place.

cards.title: Use it anywhere
cards.body: Share the storefront from social bios, campaigns, communities, QR codes, email, or partner pages.

cards.title: Keep it bookable
cards.body: Every card can point toward a booking path instead of a dead-end link.

cards.title: Partners
cards.body: Partners can use storefronts to turn recommendations into attributed booking paths.

cards.title: Booking Engine
cards.body: Storefront cards can resolve into checkout when the guest is ready to book.

cards.title: Pricing
cards.body: Understand direct, partner, and channel economics before launching storefront routes.

items.question: What is WinkLinks?
items.answer: WinkLinks is a mobile-first storefront where hotel cards, live rates, offers, and a two-tap booking path live together - at a free i.trvl.as/yourname URL.

items.question: Who uses WinkLinks?
items.answer: Hotels and Partners use WinkLinks for profile links, campaigns, QR codes, communities, and recommendation routes.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Create a WinkLinks storefront free, or request a demo to see how a bio link becomes a confirmed booking at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
